FROM
  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GL_DIST,

(
select CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
REFRESH_DATETIME from  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST
minus
select CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
REFRESH_DATETIME from  $$NRTACCUMDB.CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST 
 ) ACM
where 
 ACM.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID = CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GL_DIST.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID 
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GL_DIST.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME)
 FROM $$GGACML.CDC_RA_CUS_TRX_LIN_GL_DIS_ALL)
